title: OrchestratorCLIResult
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12 / batch runs. This schema is additive and non-breaking.

file.description: Input file or directory processed by the orchestrator.

passed.description: Whether the run passed all control-plane checks.

decision.description: Gate decision when the run does not pass.

stage.description: Stage at which the decision was made (control-plane only).

reason_code.description: Stable control-plane reason code explaining STOP/DEGRADED.

details.description: Additional diagnostic details for debugging or QA.
